items.title: Cost-effectiveness of Pilates compared with home-based exercises for people with chronic non-specific low back pain: a trial-based economic evaluation.
items.summary: A Brazilian randomized controlled trial found that Pilates was more cost-effective than home-based exercises for chronic non-specific low back pain, with comparable clinical outcomes, in 145 participants aged 18-50.
items.curatedReason: 本项来自巴西的 RCT 发现，普拉提在治疗慢性非特异性腰痛的成本效益上，优于居家锻炼，并且在治疗效果上没有显著差异。在设计腰痛管理方案时，特别是要考虑经济因素时，可以优先考虑普拉提。
items.titleZh: 普拉提与居家锻炼治疗慢性非特异性腰痛的成本效益：一项基于试验的经济学评价。
items.summaryZh: 一项来自巴西的随机对照试验发现，在治疗慢性非特异性腰痛方面，普拉提（n=72）比居家锻炼（n=73）更具成本效益，且临床效果相当。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT from Brazil found Pilates to be more cost-effective than home-based exercises for chronic non-specific low back pain, with no significant difference in treatment outcomes. When designing low back pain management plans, especially with economic considerations, prioritize Pilates.
items.limitation: 本研究仅限于巴西人群，结果外推性需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: This study was limited to the Brazilian population, so generalizability requires caution.

items.title: Acute Modulation of Lumbar Motor Unit Behavior During Experimentally Induced Low Back Pain: A Motor Unit Decomposition Analysis.
items.summary: This study investigated the effects of experimentally induced acute low back pain on force steadiness and motor unit discharge characteristics during sustained spinal extension in 33 healthy participants, finding alterations in motor unit behavior.
items.curatedReason: 急性腰痛确实会立即改变运动单元的放电模式，这可能解释了患者的运动控制障碍。但这个样本量（33人）且是诱发性疼痛，我们需谨慎解读，不宜直接推断临床患者的长期表现。
items.titleZh: 实验诱导急性腰痛期间腰部运动单位行为的急性调节：一项运动单位分解分析。
items.summaryZh: 这项研究通过运动单位分解分析，探讨了在实验诱导的急性腰痛期间，腰部运动单位行为的急性调节，发现疼痛改变了运动单位放电特性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Acute low back pain immediately alters motor unit discharge patterns, which likely contributes to impaired motor control. However, given the small sample (33 participants) and experimentally induced pain, we should be cautious about directly extrapolating these findings to the long-term clinical presentation of patients.
items.limitation: 研究对象为健康人群的实验诱导性急性腰痛，结果可能无法完全代表临床真实世界的慢性腰痛患者。
items.limitationEn: The study involved experimentally induced acute low back pain in healthy participants, so results may not fully represent chronic low back pain in real-world clinical settings.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Exploration of lifestyle interventions for individuals with knee osteoarthritis: A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review identified 36 studies (including 29 RCTs) on lifestyle interventions for knee osteoarthritis, exploring the range, characteristics, and outcome measures of these conservative strategies.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述梳理了针对膝关节骨关节炎的生活方式干预措施。它能让你全面了解当前各种非药物治疗策略的类型和评估方法，辅助你为患者制定个性化治疗方案。
items.titleZh: 膝关节骨关节炎患者生活方式干预的探索性范围综述。
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述探讨了膝关节骨关节炎患者生活方式干预措施的范围、特点和评估结果，共纳入36项研究（包括29项随机对照试验）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review synthesizes lifestyle interventions for knee osteoarthritis. It offers a comprehensive overview of current non-pharmacological treatment strategies and assessment methods, aiding you in developing individualized treatment plans for your patients.
items.limitation: 范围综述不进行质量评估，因此无法对所纳入研究的证据强度做出判断。
items.limitationEn: Scoping reviews do not assess study quality, so the strength of evidence from included studies cannot be determined.
items.journal: The South African journal of physiotherapy

items.title: Prevalence, Patterns, Treatment Outcomes and Costs of Physiotherapy-Managed Musculoskeletal Disorders in Nigeria.
items.summary: A 10-year retrospective study of 1582 patients in Nigeria assessed the prevalence, patterns, treatment outcomes, and costs of physiotherapy-managed musculoskeletal disorders, finding a mean age of 47.8 ± 25.7 years and predominantly female patients.
items.curatedReason: 这项来自尼日利亚的回顾性研究首次提供了该地区由物理治疗师管理的肌肉骨骼疾病的流行病学、治疗结果和成本数据。这对于了解不同医疗系统背景下物理治疗服务的需求和价值有重要参考意义。
items.titleZh: 尼日利亚物理治疗师管理肌肉骨骼疾病的患病率、模式、治疗结果和成本。
items.summaryZh: 一项对尼日利亚1582名患者进行的10年回顾性研究评估了由物理治疗师管理的肌肉骨骼疾病的患病率、模式、治疗效果和成本，发现平均年龄为47.8 ± 25.7岁，患者以女性为主。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective study from Nigeria provides the first data on the epidemiology, treatment outcomes, and costs of musculoskeletal disorders managed by physical therapists in the region. This is highly relevant for understanding the demand and value of physical therapy services within diverse healthcare systems.
items.limitation: 作为回顾性研究，数据收集可能存在选择偏倚和信息不完整。
items.limitationEn: As a retrospective study, data collection may be subject to selection bias and incomplete information.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Long-term benefits of ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation for chronic lateral elbow pain: a randomized controlled trial
items.summary: This randomized controlled trial investigates the long-term benefits of ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation for chronic lateral elbow pain, a condition affecting 3% to 4% of adults worldwide.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 为慢性外侧肘痛提供了新的微创干预选项。如果患者对传统保守治疗反应不佳，你可以考虑转诊或与团队讨论将超声引导经皮电神经刺激作为潜在治疗方案，但记住其长期效果仍需更多验证。
items.titleZh: 超声引导经皮电神经刺激治疗慢性外侧肘痛的长期疗效：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验探讨了超声引导经皮电神经刺激治疗慢性外侧肘痛的长期疗效。慢性外侧肘痛影响全球约 3% 至 4% 的成年人。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT offers a new minimally invasive intervention for chronic lateral elbow pain. If patients respond poorly to traditional conservative treatments, you might consider referral or discuss ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation as a potential option, keeping in mind that its long-term efficacy needs further validation.
items.limitation: 研究未明确报告样本量，且该技术依赖超声引导，对操作者的技能和设备有较高要求，可能影响其在普适临床实践中的可推广性。
items.limitationEn: The study did not explicitly report the sample size. Additionally, this technique relies on ultrasound guidance, requiring high operator skill and specialized equipment, which may limit its generalizability in widespread clinical practice.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

related.title: Long-term benefits of ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation for chronic lateral elbow pain: a randomized controlled trial.

items.title: Adherence to exercise intervention including pain threshold, exercise and physiotherapy sessions for patients with chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy.
items.summary: This RCT (N=84) evaluated adherence to two pain threshold protocols during a 26-week exercise intervention for chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy, finding that consistent pain level differences were maintained between groups.
items.curatedReason: 这项纳入 84 人的 RCT 提示，在肩袖肌腱病患者 26 周的运动干预中，不同的疼痛阈值管理协议能持续维持疼痛水平差异，并影响患者依从性。这意味着我们在临床实践中，应根据患者具体情况精细化疼痛管理。
items.titleZh: 慢性肩袖肌腱病患者在包含疼痛阈值、运动和物理治疗的干预中的依从性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对慢性肩袖肌腱病患者的 RCT 研究（N=84）评估了 26 周运动干预中两种疼痛阈值协议的依从性，结果显示各组间疼痛水平差异保持一致。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT (N=84) suggests that different pain threshold management protocols can consistently maintain pain level differences and impact adherence in patients undergoing a 26-week exercise intervention for rotator cuff tendinopathy. This means we should refine pain management in clinical practice based on individual patient needs.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（N=84），可能影响结果的普遍性。
items.limitationEn: The study's relatively small sample size (N=84) may limit the generalizability of the findings.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Adherence to exercise intervention including pain threshold, exercise and physiotherapy sessions for patients with chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy

items.title: Physical therapy protocols for patients with a megaprosthesis after bone tumor resection.
items.summary: Consensus-based physical therapy protocols were developed and piloted for patients with megaprostheses after bone tumor resection, providing evidence-based guidance for six different megaprosthesis types.
items.curatedReason: 针对骨肿瘤切除术后巨型假体置换患者的物理治疗方案发布。这些方案是基于文献探索和专家共识制定的，能为你这类特殊患者群体的康复提供结构化指导。
items.titleZh: 骨肿瘤切除后巨型假体置换患者的物理治疗方案
items.summaryZh: 针对骨肿瘤切除和巨型假体重建患者，通过文献探索和专家共识程序，制定并试点实施了六种不同巨型假体的物理治疗方案，旨在提供循证指导。
items.curatedReasonEn: Physical therapy protocols for patients with megaprostheses after bone tumor resection have been published. These evidence-based and consensus-driven protocols offer structured guidance for rehabilitating this specific patient population.
items.limitation: 该协议是基于专家共识而非对照研究，其有效性尚需进一步的临床验证。
items.limitationEn: The protocol is based on expert consensus rather than controlled studies, and its efficacy requires further clinical validation.

items.title: In safe hands - patients with knee and hip osteoarthritis expectations and experience of physical therapist-led triage in a secondary care setting.
items.summary: An explorative qualitative study found that while patients with hip or knee OA perceived PT-led triage as good quality, they reported lower participation in decision-making and less fulfillment of assessment expectations.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究提醒我们，尽管髋/膝关节骨关节炎患者普遍认为物理治疗师主导的分诊质量不错，但他们在决策参与度和评估期望满足度上感受较低。推行 PT 主导分诊时，务必提高患者在诊疗决策中的参与感，并明确评估范围，以避免期望落差。
items.titleZh: 膝髋骨关节炎患者对二级医疗机构物理治疗师主导分诊的期望与体验
items.summaryZh: 一项探索性定性研究发现，髋膝骨关节炎患者认为物理治疗师主导的分诊质量良好，但在决策参与度和评估期望满足度方面报告较低。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study highlights that while hip/knee OA patients generally perceive PT-led triage as high quality, they report lower participation in decision-making and less fulfillment of assessment expectations. When implementing PT-led triage, ensure patients feel more involved in treatment decisions and clearly define assessment scope to manage expectations.
items.limitation: 作为定性研究，其结果不具备普遍性，但为理解患者体验提供了深入的视角。
items.limitationEn: As a qualitative study, its findings are not generalizable but offer in-depth insights into patient experiences.

items.title: Sexual function during primary rehabilitation after spinal cord injury: A descriptive analysis from a population-based cohort.
items.summary: Cross-sectional analysis of a population-based cohort (N=605) described the distribution and risk factors for sexual dysfunction during primary SCI rehabilitation, finding 67% reported at least one sexual dysfunction symptom.
items.curatedReason: 这是一项重要的横断面分析，对 605 名脊髓损伤（SCI）患者的数据显示，高达 67% 的人在早期康复期间报告至少一种性功能障碍症状。这些数据再次强调了在 SCI 康复初期，我们必须主动筛查和解决患者的性健康需求，将其纳入常规康复计划。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤早期康复期间的性功能：一项基于人群队列的描述性分析
items.summaryZh: 一项基于人群队列的横断面分析（N=605）描述了脊髓损伤早期康复期间性功能障碍的分布和风险因素，结果显示 67% 的患者报告至少一种性功能障碍症状。
items.curatedReasonEn: This crucial cross-sectional analysis of 605 SCI patients reveals that 67% reported at least one sexual dysfunction symptom during primary rehabilitation. These data re-emphasize that we must proactively screen for and address patients' sexual health needs in early SCI rehabilitation, integrating it into routine care plans.
items.limitation: 研究设计为横断面分析，无法建立因果关系，且数据可能存在回忆偏倚。
items.limitationEn: The cross-sectional design prevents causal inference, and data may be subject to recall bias.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Sexual function during primary rehabilitation after spinal cord injury: A descriptive analysis from a population-based cohort

items.title: "My aim is to contribute to a meaningful life." Experiences of physiotherapists treating children and adolescents with cerebral palsy experiencing pain-a qualitative study.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored eight physiotherapists' experiences treating children with cerebral palsy experiencing pain, identifying themes of facilitating wellbeing through bodily practice, embracing body experiences, and creating alliances based on safety, trust, and respect.
items.curatedReason: 这项对 8 名物理治疗师的定性研究揭示，治疗脑瘫儿童疼痛时，关键在于通过身体实践促进福祉、接纳身体体验，并建立基于安全、信任和尊重的同盟。作为治疗师，这提醒我们，处理这类复杂情况时，不仅要关注生理层面，更要注重情感连接和医患关系。
items.titleZh: “我的目标是为有意义的生活做贡献。”物理治疗师治疗患有疼痛的脑瘫儿童和青少年的经验——一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究探讨了八位物理治疗师在治疗患有疼痛的脑瘫儿童时的经验，研究发现通过身体治疗实践促进福祉，将身体体验作为理解和治疗疼痛的核心起点，以及基于安全、信任和尊重与儿童建立联盟是关键。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study with 8 physiotherapists reveals that treating pain in children with cerebral palsy is critical for facilitating well-being through bodily practice, embracing body experiences, and building alliances based on safety, trust, and respect. As therapists, this reminds us that in these complex cases, we must focus not only on the physiological but also on emotional connection and the patient-provider relationship.
items.limitation: 作为定性研究，样本量小（N=8），结果不具有普遍性，但能提供深层见解。
items.limitationEn: As a qualitative study, the small sample size (N=8) limits generalizability but provides in-depth insights.

items.title: Early Access and Adherence to Physiotherapy in Children With Cerebral Palsy: Hospital-Based Study in Cameroon.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study in Cameroon found that only 38.3% of 94 children with cerebral palsy accessed physiotherapy early (before 5 months of age) and showed good adherence (≥50% of sessions).
items.curatedReason: 喀麦隆的这项横断面研究显示，94 名脑瘫儿童中只有 38.3% 能在 5 个月前接受早期物理治疗，并达到 ≥50% 的良好依从性。这暴露了低收入国家康复服务可及性和依从性的严峻挑战，促使我们反思如何通过社区协作和家长教育，最大程度地提升脑瘫儿童的早期干预率。
items.titleZh: 喀麦隆脑瘫儿童早期物理治疗的可及性和依从性：一项基于医院的研究
items.summaryZh: 一项在喀麦隆进行的横断面研究发现，94 名脑瘫儿童中仅有 38.3% 在早期（5 个月前）接受物理治疗，并有良好依从性（完成≥50% 的治疗疗程）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study in Cameroon shows that only 38.3% of 94 children with cerebral palsy accessed early physiotherapy (before 5 months of age) and maintained good adherence (≥50% of sessions). This highlights severe challenges in rehabilitation service accessibility and adherence in low-income countries, prompting us to consider how community collaboration and parent education can maximize early intervention rates for children with CP.
items.limitation: 该研究为单中心横断面研究，结果可能无法完全推广至其他地区或国家。
items.limitationEn: As a single-center cross-sectional study, its findings may not be fully generalizable to other regions or countries.
items.journal: Pediatric physical therapy : the official publication of the Section on Pediatrics of the American Physical Therapy Association

items.title: Prediction of Exercise Intolerance in the Recovery Period After Cardiovascular Surgery Using Perioperative Clinical Parameters.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study (N=590) developed and validated a machine learning model to predict reduced exercise capacity at 3 months post-cardiovascular surgery using perioperative clinical parameters available at hospital discharge.
items.curatedReason: 这项纳入 590 人的回顾性队列研究开发并验证了一个机器学习模型，能利用出院时的围手术期临床参数，预测心血管手术后 3 个月的运动能力下降风险。这个模型为我们早期识别高风险患者、从而更精准地调整康复计划提供了重要工具。
items.titleZh: 利用围手术期临床参数预测心血管手术后恢复期的运动不耐受
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究（N=590）开发并验证了一个机器学习模型，利用出院时可用的围手术期临床参数，预测心血管手术后 3 个月的运动能力下降。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective cohort study (N=590) developed and validated a machine learning model that can predict reduced exercise capacity at 3 months post-cardiovascular surgery using perioperative clinical parameters available at hospital discharge. This model provides an important tool for early identification of high-risk patients, allowing us to more precisely tailor rehabilitation plans.
items.limitation: 该模型是在单中心数据上开发和验证的，其在不同医疗环境中的外部有效性尚需进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: The model was developed and validated on single-center data, and its external validity in different healthcare settings requires further verification.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Prediction of Exercise Intolerance in the Recovery Period After Cardiovascular Surgery Using Perioperative Clinical Parameters

items.title: Patient Engagement, Clinical Outcomes, and Satisfaction of an Advanced Orthopedic Virtual Physical Therapy Model: A Retrospective Cohort Study.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study found that an advanced orthopedic virtual physical therapy model resulted in a 70.9% plan-of-care completion rate (exceeding national benchmarks of 43%), with 96% of completers achieving Minimal Clinically Important Differences.
items.curatedReason: 远程物理治疗模型在新技术辅助下，有望显著提升患者依从性和临床结局。本研究显示，先进虚拟 PT 模型能将依从率提升近 30 个百分点，并让绝大多数患者达到最小临床重要差异。在考虑远程 PT 时，请关注这类集成技术的模型。
items.titleZh: 先进骨科虚拟物理治疗模型的患者参与度、临床结局与满意度：一项回顾性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究显示，先进的骨科虚拟物理治疗模型实现了 70.9% 的治疗方案完成率（高于全国基准的 43%），其中 96% 的完成者达到了最小临床重要差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: Advanced virtual physical therapy models show promise in significantly improving patient adherence and clinical outcomes. This study demonstrates an advanced virtual PT model can boost adherence by nearly 30 percentage points, with most patients achieving Minimal Clinically Important Differences. When considering telehealth PT, prioritize models integrating such advanced technologies.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性队列研究，且未设对照组，可能存在选择偏倚和混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: This was a retrospective cohort study without a control group, which may introduce selection bias and confounding factors.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Transcranial Direct Current Stimulation (tDCS) Application in Neurorehabilitation: A Beginner’s Guide for Clinicians
items.summary: This clinician's guide outlines transcranial direct current stimulation (tDCS) as a noninvasive brain stimulation technique that modulates brain excitability at subthreshold levels, highlighting its low cost (often <$1k) and ease of integration with rehabilitation therapy.
items.curatedReason: 经颅直流电刺激（tDCS）作为一种经济且易于整合的非侵入性脑刺激技术，正被越来越多地应用于神经康复。这份“初学者指南”为你提供了 tDCS 的基本原理、操作细节和临床考量，帮助你了解是否适合将其引入你的实践。
items.titleZh: 经颅直流电刺激（tDCS）在神经康复中的应用：临床医生初学者指南
items.summaryZh: 这份临床医生指南介绍了经颅直流电刺激（tDCS）作为一种非侵入性脑刺激技术，它在阈下水平调节大脑兴奋性，并强调了其低成本（通常低于 1000 美元）和易于与康复治疗结合的优势。
items.curatedReasonEn: Transcranial Direct Current Stimulation (tDCS) is a low-cost, easily integrated neurorehabilitation technique. This guide explains its principles and clinical applications, helping you decide whether to explore its integration into your practice.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Telerehabilitation during the hospital-to-home transition for stroke survivors: A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review identified and mapped telerehabilitation intervention models, outcome domains, and evidence gaps for stroke survivors during the hospital-to-home transition, based on searches from 2000 onward.
items.curatedReason: 卒中患者出院到居家过渡期的远程康复需求明确。这份范围综述能帮你快速了解当前介入模型、关注的结局指标和现存证据空白，为开展服务或设计研究提供线索。
items.titleZh: 卒中幸存者出院到居家过渡期的远程康复：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述旨在识别和映射 2000 年以来卒中幸存者出院到居家过渡期远程康复的干预模型、结局领域和证据空白。
items.curatedReasonEn: The need for telerehabilitation during the hospital-to-home transition for stroke survivors is clear. This scoping review provides a quick overview of current intervention models, outcome domains, and existing evidence gaps, offering insights for service implementation or research design.
items.limitation: 范围综述旨在识别和映射现有研究，不进行质量评估或综合证据以得出明确结论。
items.limitationEn: Scoping reviews aim to identify and map existing research, not to assess quality or synthesize evidence for definitive conclusions.

items.title: Profile of patients attending private vestibular physiotherapy clinics in Spain: A cross-sectional study.
items.summary: A multicentre cross-sectional study in Spain characterized the demographic, clinical, and healthcare utilization profiles of patients attending private vestibular physiotherapy clinics for vertigo, dizziness, or unsteadiness.
items.curatedReason: 这份西班牙前瞻性研究勾勒了私人诊所前庭康复患者的画像。可以与你的患者群特征对比，了解地区间转诊模式和临床需求的异同。
items.titleZh: 西班牙私人前庭物理治疗诊所患者画像：一项横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项在西班牙进行的多中心横断面研究，旨在描述到私人前庭物理治疗诊所就诊的眩晕、头晕或不稳定患者的人口统计学、临床和医疗利用特征。
items.curatedReasonEn: This Spanish prospective study outlines the profile of patients attending private vestibular physiotherapy clinics. You can compare it with your patient population to understand similarities and differences in referral patterns and clinical needs across regions.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面调查，仅能提供相关性信息，无法建立因果关系，且可能存在回忆偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional survey can only provide correlational information and cannot establish causality, and may be subject to recall bias.

items.title: Impact of lower limb proprioception on balance and gait in hemiparetic patients: biomechanical analysis.
items.summary: This study investigated associations between lower extremity proprioceptive impairments (foot sole sensation, position sense, kinesthesia) and objective balance/gait measures in hemiparetic stroke patients.
items.curatedReason: 明确下肢本体感觉障碍与偏瘫患者平衡和步态的具体关系，提示你在评估时要警惕本体感觉的缺失，并可能指导你将本体感觉训练纳入干预方案。
items.titleZh: 下肢本体感觉对偏瘫患者平衡和步态的影响：生物力学分析
items.summaryZh: 本研究调查了偏瘫卒中患者下肢本体感觉障碍（足底感觉、位置觉和运动觉）与客观平衡和步态测量之间的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: Clarifying the specific relationship between lower limb proprioceptive deficits and balance/gait in hemiparetic patients suggests you should be vigilant about proprioceptive loss during assessment and consider incorporating proprioceptive training into interventions.
items.limitation: 研究未明确样本量，且为横断面设计，无法推断本体感觉障碍与平衡/步态之间的因果关系或干预效果。
items.limitationEn: The study does not specify sample size and, being a cross-sectional design, cannot infer causality or intervention effects between proprioceptive impairment and balance/gait.

items.title: Effects of spatial and temporal pre-verbal prioritized instructions on spatiotemporal gait parameters in stroke patients: A within-subject repeated-measures study.
items.summary: A within-subject repeated-measures study with 27 stroke patients found that spatial and temporal pre-verbal prioritized instructions differentially affected spatiotemporal gait parameters compared to a no-prioritization condition.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究提示，对卒中患者的步态训练，区分“空间优先”和“时间优先”的语言指令，可能影响步态参数改善。在你的临床实践中，可以尝试调整语言指令的侧重，观察患者反应。
items.titleZh: 空间和时间优先口头指令对卒中患者时空步态参数的影响：一项自身重复测量研究
items.summaryZh: 一项对 27 名卒中患者进行的自身重复测量研究发现，空间和时间优先的口头指令与无优先指令相比，对时空步态参数产生了不同的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study suggests that for gait training in stroke patients, distinguishing between “spatial prioritization” and “temporal prioritization” verbal instructions may influence gait parameter improvements. In your clinical practice, try adjusting the emphasis of verbal instructions and observe patient responses.
items.limitation: 本研究为小样本（27 例卒中患者）的自身前后对照研究，外推性有限，且长期效果未知。
items.limitationEn: This is a within-subject repeated-measures study with a small sample size (27 stroke patients), limiting generalizability and leaving long-term effects unknown.

items.title: Triceps Surae Neuromuscular Activity During Single-leg Jumping Tasks in Individuals After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction.
items.summary: This study compared triceps surae EMG activity during single-leg jumping tasks between individuals after ACL reconstruction and healthy controls, also examining bilateral differences within the ACLR group.
items.curatedReason: ACL 重建术后单腿跳跃任务中，三头肌的神经肌肉活动可能存在差异。这提示你在康复评估和训练中，别忽视足三头肌在重返运动中的作用，要系统评估并强化其功能。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建术后个体单腿跳跃任务中足三头肌神经肌肉活动
items.summaryZh: 本研究比较了前交叉韧带重建术后个体与健康对照组在单腿跳跃任务中足三头肌的肌电活动，并探讨了 ACLR 组内的双侧差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: Neuromuscular activity of the triceps surae during single-leg jumping tasks may differ after ACL reconstruction. This suggests you should not overlook the role of the triceps surae in return-to-sport rehabilitation; systematically assess and strengthen its function.
items.limitation: 研究设计为对照研究，但未明确样本量，且 EMG 结果的临床意义需结合其他功能评估。
items.limitationEn: The study design is a controlled study, but the sample size is not specified, and the clinical significance of EMG results needs to be combined with other functional assessments.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Individual Prognostication of Emergence from Post-Traumatic Amnesia: A Nationwide Cohort Study
items.summary: A nationwide cohort study aimed to predict individual emergence from post-traumatic amnesia (PTA) in patients with moderate to severe traumatic brain injury (TBI).
items.curatedReason: 预测创伤性脑损伤（TBI）患者从创伤后遗忘症（PTA）中恢复的时间点，这项队列研究提示了更精准的预后判断方式，有助于优化康复计划和管理患者预期。
items.titleZh: 创伤后遗忘症恢复的个体预后：一项全国性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项全国性队列研究旨在预测中度至重度创伤性脑损伤（TBI）患者创伤后遗忘症（PTA）恢复的个体情况。
items.curatedReasonEn: Predicting the timing of emergence from post-traumatic amnesia (PTA) in TBI patients, this cohort study suggests a more precise prognostic approach, aiding in optimizing rehabilitation plans and managing patient expectations.
items.limitation: 研究设计为队列研究，可能存在混杂因素，且未明确预测模型的具体表现（如敏感性、特异性）。
items.limitationEn: The study design is a cohort study, which may have confounding factors, and the specific performance of the predictive model (e.g., sensitivity, specificity) is not explicitly stated.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Assessment and Management Practices for Post-Stroke Shoulder Pain Among Rehabilitation Professionals in Vietnam: A Cross-Sectional Survey.
items.summary: A cross-sectional survey in Vietnam identified variations in assessment and management practices for post-stroke shoulder pain among rehabilitation professionals, highlighting potential evidence-practice gaps and barriers to effective care in lower- and middle-income countries.
items.curatedReason: 本项调查描绘了越南卒中后肩痛的评估与管理现状，提示当地康复专业人员的实践可能与循证指南存在差异。虽然不直接改变你的临床决策，但为了解全球实践差距提供了一个侧面视角。
items.titleZh: 越南康复专业人员卒中后肩痛评估与管理实践：一项横断面调查
items.summaryZh: 一项在越南进行的横断面调查发现，当地康复专业人员在卒中后肩痛的评估和管理实践上存在差异，揭示了中低收入国家在循证实践与有效护理方面的潜在差距和障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study from Vietnam suggests variations in assessment and management practices for post-stroke shoulder pain, possibly indicating evidence-practice gaps. It highlights potential challenges in rehabilitation practices within lower- and middle-income countries.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面调查，仅反映特定时期的实践，无法揭示实践变化趋势或因果关系。
items.limitationEn: As a cross-sectional survey, this study only reflects practices at a specific time and cannot reveal trends in practice changes or causal relationships.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Eight weeks of visual perturbation training effects on unanticipated cutting lower-limb biomechanics and errors in male athletes following anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction: a randomized controlled clinical trial (RCT).
items.summary: An RCT of 24 male athletes post-ACLR showed that 8 weeks of visual perturbation training significantly improved lower-limb biomechanics and reduced errors during unanticipated cutting maneuvers compared to conventional training, enhancing neuromuscular control.
items.curatedReason: ACL 重建术后患者的视觉干扰训练可能改善非预期变向切割动作的下肢生物力学。这提示在重返运动训练中加入此类认知运动双重任务训练，能更全面地解决神经肌肉缺陷，有效降低再次损伤风险。这是功能性重返运动训练的重要进步。
items.titleZh: 视觉干扰训练对前交叉韧带重建术后男性运动员非预期变向切割下肢生物力学和错误的影响：一项随机对照临床试验（RCT）
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 24 名 ACLR 术后男性运动员的随机对照试验（RCT）显示，8 周的视觉干扰训练显著改善了非预期变向切割动作中的下肢生物力学并减少了错误，增强了神经肌肉控制。
items.curatedReasonEn: Visual perturbation training might improve lower-limb biomechanics during unanticipated cutting maneuvers in athletes post-ACL reconstruction. This suggests that incorporating such cognitive-motor dual-task training into return-to-sport protocols can more comprehensively address neuromuscular deficits and effectively reduce re-injury risk. This is a significant advancement in functional return-to-sport training.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（24 名运动员），且仅针对男性运动员，结果的普遍性需更多研究验证。
items.limitationEn: The study involved a small sample size (24 athletes) and was limited to male athletes, so the generalizability of its findings requires further validation.

items.title: Factors Affecting Clinical Decision Making for Blood Flow Restriction Training in Pediatric and Adolescent Patients Following Anterior Cruciate Ligament Injury.
items.summary: A cross-sectional survey of physical therapists identified factors influencing clinical decision-making for blood flow restriction training (BFRT) in pediatric and adolescent patients following anterior cruciate ligament injury, indicating varying application practices.
items.curatedReason: 这项调查揭示了物理治疗师在 ACL 损伤后对儿科和青少年患者进行血流限制训练（BFRT）的决策因素。这提示你在考虑将 BFRT 用于青少年时，除了关注研究证据，还要理解临床实践中权衡的患者特征，以确保安全有效。
items.titleZh: 影响前交叉韧带损伤后儿科和青少年患者血流限制训练临床决策的因素
items.summaryZh: 一项针对物理治疗师的横断面调查确定了影响前交叉韧带损伤后儿科和青少年患者血流限制训练（BFRT）临床决策的因素，表明存在不同的应用实践。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey reveals the factors influencing physical therapists' decision-making regarding blood flow restriction training (BFRT) in pediatric and adolescent patients post-ACL injury. This suggests that when considering BFRT for adolescents, in addition to research evidence, you should understand the patient characteristics weighed in clinical practice to ensure safety and effectiveness.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面调查，依赖物理治疗师的自报，可能存在报告偏倚，且无法揭示决策因素与 BFRT 疗效的因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional survey relies on self-reported data from physical therapists, which may introduce reporting bias and cannot establish a causal link between decision factors and BFRT efficacy.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Effects of Dynamic Taping on Dynamic Balance and Proprioception in Recreational Athletes with Chronic Ankle Instability.
items.summary: A single-blind RCT of 28 recreational athletes with chronic ankle instability found that both Dynamic Taping and Sports Taping produced immediate, comparable improvements in dynamic balance and proprioception.
items.curatedReason: 动态贴扎（DT）和运动贴扎（ST）对慢性踝关节不稳（CAI）患者的动态平衡和本体感觉有即时效应。尽管 DT 宣称不限制运动，但本研究显示与 ST 效果相似。这意味着 DT 并非绝对优势，选择贴扎类型仍需结合患者具体需求和临床经验。
items.titleZh: 动态贴扎对慢性踝关节不稳休闲运动员动态平衡和本体感觉的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 28 名慢性踝关节不稳休闲运动员的单盲随机对照试验发现，动态贴扎和运动贴扎均能立即、可比地改善动态平衡和本体感觉。
items.curatedReasonEn: Dynamic Taping (DT) and Sports Taping (ST) show immediate effects on dynamic balance and proprioception in patients with Chronic Ankle Instability (CAI). Although DT claims not to restrict movement, this study indicates similar effects to ST. This implies DT is not definitively superior, and the choice of taping should still integrate patient-specific needs and clinical experience.
items.limitation: 研究样本量小（28 名参与者），且仅评估了贴扎的即时效果，长期效果和临床意义尚待进一步研究。
items.limitationEn: The study has a small sample size (28 participants) and only assessed the immediate effects of taping; long-term effects and clinical significance require further investigation.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Biomechanical effects of Kinesio versus Mulligan ankle taping on balance and ankle function in chronic STROKE: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: An RCT of 33 chronic stroke individuals found that Kinesio taping with treadmill training and Mulligan taping with treadmill training significantly improved ankle dorsiflexion ROM, balance, ankle stability, and fall efficacy over 6 weeks compared to treadmill training alone.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 发现 Kinesio 贴扎结合跑步机训练与 Mulligan 贴扎结合跑步机训练，在改善慢性卒中患者踝关节功能方面优于单纯跑步机训练。这提示贴扎作为辅助手段，能增强康复效果，尤其在踝关节背屈 ROM、平衡和稳定性上。
items.titleZh: Kinesio 贴扎与 Mulligan 踝关节贴扎对慢性卒中患者平衡和踝关节生物力学效应的比较：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 33 名慢性卒中患者的随机对照试验发现，Kinesio 贴扎结合跑步机训练和 Mulligan 贴扎结合跑步机训练在 6 周内显著改善了踝关节背屈活动范围、平衡、踝关节稳定性和跌倒效能，优于单纯跑步机训练。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT found that Kinesio taping combined with treadmill training, and Mulligan taping combined with treadmill training, were superior to treadmill training alone in improving ankle function in chronic stroke patients. This suggests that taping, as an adjunct, can enhance rehabilitation outcomes, especially in ankle dorsiflexion ROM, balance, and stability.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（33 人），且随访期较短（6 周），长期效果和不同贴扎技术的相对优势需更多研究支持。
items.limitationEn: The study has a small sample size (33 participants) and a short follow-up period (6 weeks); long-term effects and the relative advantages of different taping techniques require further research.

items.title: "Most inactive in my life": patient-reported barriers to cardiac rehabilitation in heart failure.
items.summary: A qualitative study of 22 adults with heart failure identified patient-reported barriers to cardiac rehabilitation participation, including feeling "most inactive in my life" and challenges related to depressive symptoms and perceived stress, contributing to underutilization.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究揭示了心力衰竭患者参与心脏康复的报告障碍，如“一生中最不活跃”。这提示你在转诊或鼓励患者参与心脏康复时，需要更深入地了解并解决他们的个体化障碍，例如通过个性化动机访谈和支持。
items.titleZh: “我一生中最不活跃的时刻”：心力衰竭患者报告的心脏康复障碍
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 22 名心力衰竭成年人的定性研究发现，患者报告的心脏康复参与障碍包括感觉“我一生中最不活跃的时刻”以及与抑郁症状和感知压力相关的挑战，这些因素导致心脏康复利用率低下。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study uncovers patient-reported barriers to cardiac rehabilitation participation in heart failure, such as feeling “most inactive in my life.” This suggests that when referring or encouraging patients to engage in cardiac rehabilitation, you need to delve deeper into and address their individualized barriers, for example, through personalized motivational interviewing and support.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量小（22 名成年人），结果的普遍性有限，主要提供深入的经验理解而非量化数据。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative study with a small sample size (22 adults), so the generalizability of its findings is limited; it primarily offers in-depth experiential understanding rather than quantitative data.

items.title: Validity and reliability of on‑site and off‑site direct observation of procedural skills (DOPS) for knee mobilization in Physical therapy education.
items.summary: The direct observation of procedural skills for knee joint mobilization (DOPSknee) tool demonstrated good on-site inter-rater reliability and acceptable validity for assessing preclinical competencies of physical therapy students in both on-site and off-site settings.
items.curatedReason: 这份验证研究为膝关节松动术的直接观察程序技能（DOPSknee）工具提供了信效度证据，尤其是在远程评估场景下。这对物理治疗教育者评估学生临床能力、统一评估标准有参考价值。
items.titleZh: 膝关节松动术直接观察程序技能（DOPS）工具在物理治疗教育中信效度研究：现场与远程观察的比较
items.summaryZh: 膝关节松动术的直接观察程序技能（DOPSknee）工具在现场评估时表现出良好的评估者间信度，并在现场和远程环境中均显示出可接受的效度，可用于评估物理治疗学生的临床前能力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This validation study provides evidence for the reliability and validity of the direct observation of procedural skills (DOPSknee) tool for knee joint mobilization, especially in off-site assessment scenarios. It is valuable for physical therapy educators in assessing student clinical competencies and standardizing evaluation methods.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（42 名学生），且仅限于膝关节松动术，外推至其他技能或更大范围人群需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study involved a small sample size (42 students) and was limited to knee joint mobilization, so extrapolation to other skills or a broader population should be done cautiously.
items.journal: The Journal of manual & manipulative therapy

items.title: TRAK MSK: a randomised external feasibility trial and process evaluation of a digital physiotherapy supported self-management programme for people with musculoskeletal pain.
items.summary: The TRAK MSK digital physiotherapy-supported self-management program demonstrated feasibility in a randomized external feasibility trial, enabling people with musculoskeletal pain to improve knowledge, confidence, and skills for self-management over 16 weeks.
items.curatedReason: TRAK MSK 数字支持自我管理项目在可行性试验中表现良好。这提示数字化工具在骨骼肌肉疼痛管理中潜力巨大，尤其是在提升患者知识、信心和技能方面。关注后续确证性 RCT 结果，它可能改变你未来的转诊和辅助方案。
items.titleZh: TRAK MSK：数字物理治疗支持的肌肉骨骼疼痛自我管理项目可行性随机对照试验及过程评估
items.summaryZh: TRAK MSK 数字物理治疗支持的自我管理项目在一项随机外部可行性试验中展现出可行性，该项目帮助肌肉骨骼疼痛患者在 16 周内提升了自我管理所需的知识、信心和技能。
items.curatedReasonEn: The TRAK MSK digital self-management program showed promising results in its feasibility trial. This suggests significant potential for digital tools in musculoskeletal pain management, particularly in enhancing patient knowledge, confidence, and skills. Monitor the results of subsequent definitive RCTs, as they could impact your future referral and adjunct treatment strategies.
items.limitation: 本研究是可行性试验，样本量有限，且旨在评估开展大规模试验的可行性，而非直接评估干预的疗效。
items.limitationEn: This was a feasibility trial with a limited sample size, designed to assess the viability of a large-scale trial rather than directly evaluate intervention efficacy.

items.title: Major discrepancies in recommendations regarding long-term activity restrictions following knee replacement: a survey among Swedish physiotherapists.
items.summary: A survey among Swedish physiotherapists revealed major discrepancies in recommendations for long-term activity restrictions following knee replacement, indicating a lack of consistent evidence-based guidance.
items.curatedReason: 这项调查揭示了瑞典物理治疗师在膝关节置换术后长期活动限制建议上的显著差异。这反映出指南证据不足导致实践不一的问题，你需要警惕过度或不足的活动限制建议可能对患者恢复产生负面影响。
items.titleZh: 膝关节置换术后长期活动限制建议存在显著差异：瑞典物理治疗师调查
items.summaryZh: 一项对瑞典物理治疗师的调查显示，在膝关节置换术后长期活动限制的建议上存在显著差异，表明缺乏一致的循证指导。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey reveals significant discrepancies in long-term activity restriction recommendations among Swedish physical therapists following knee replacement. This highlights an issue where insufficient guideline evidence leads to varied practices, and you should be aware of how excessive or insufficient activity restriction advice might negatively impact patient recovery.
items.limitation: 本研究是基于调查问卷的观察性研究，可能存在回忆偏倚和报告偏倚，且无法建立建议差异与患者结局之间的因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This is an observational study based on surveys, which may have recall and reporting biases, and cannot establish a causal relationship between recommendation discrepancies and patient outcomes.

items.title: Professional reintegration after stroke: experiences of Portuguese stroke survivors.
items.summary: A survey of 1,175 Portuguese stroke survivors found that professional reintegration after stroke remains challenging due to physical and cognitive impairments, fatigue, and insufficient workplace adaptations, highlighting RTW as a key milestone for recovery.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对葡萄牙卒中幸存者的报告强调了重返工作（RTW）在卒中康复中的重要性，以及其面临的物理、认知障碍和职场适应挑战。这提示你在制定康复计划时，应更关注职业功能恢复，并与患者讨论职场支持需求。
items.titleZh: 卒中后重返工作：葡萄牙卒中幸存者的经验
items.summaryZh: 一项对 1,175 名葡萄牙卒中幸存者的调查发现，由于身体和认知障碍、疲劳及职场适应不足，卒中后的职业再融入仍具挑战性，凸显重返工作是康复的关键里程碑。
items.curatedReasonEn: This report on Portuguese stroke survivors highlights the importance of Return to Work (RTW) in stroke rehabilitation, along with the physical, cognitive, and workplace adaptation challenges. This suggests that you should focus more on vocational functional recovery when developing rehabilitation plans and discuss workplace support needs with patients.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性横断面调查，依赖患者自报，可能存在回忆偏倚，且无法推断因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This retrospective cross-sectional survey relies on self-reported data from patients, which may introduce recall bias and prevent causal inferences.

items.title: Incomplete Cognitive Assessment in Post-Acute Stroke Rehabilitation: Recovering Clinically Interpretable Relationships from Routine Neuropsychological Data.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study found that incomplete routine post-stroke cognitive assessments can still yield clinically interpretable relationships among cognitive, clinical, and contextual variables, supporting group-level stratification.
items.curatedReason: 该回顾性队列研究表明，即使卒中后认知评估不完整，仍可从中解读出认知、临床及环境因素间的相关性。提示你即使在数据不全的情况下，也可以尝试利用信息进行群体分层。
items.titleZh: 卒中后急性期康复中不完整认知评估：从常规神经心理学数据中恢复临床可解释关系
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究发现，卒中后不完整的常规认知评估仍能揭示认知、临床和情境变量之间的临床可解释关系，支持基于群体的分层。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective cohort study indicates that even incomplete post-stroke cognitive assessments can reveal interpretable relationships among cognitive, clinical, and contextual variables. It suggests you can still attempt to stratify groups using available information, even when data is incomplete.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性队列研究，且评估数据本身存在不完整性，可能影响结果的精确性和外推性。
items.limitationEn: This retrospective cohort study used incomplete assessment data, which may affect the precision and generalizability of its findings.

items.title: "If you don't sort out these problems, you end up building problems": a qualitative study exploring mouthcare at home with people with Parkinson's and their partners in care.
items.summary: A qualitative study of 13 people with Parkinson's and 7 partners in care identified motor and non-motor barriers, including reduced dexterity, fatigue, and apathy, that challenge home mouthcare activities.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究揭示了帕金森病患者及其照护者在口腔护理方面面临的挑战，如精细动作障碍、疲劳和冷漠。这提示你在康复计划中，不应忽视日常生活活动（ADL）的细节，应主动评估患者及家庭在口腔卫生等方面的功能障碍并提供支持。
items.titleZh: “如果你不解决这些问题，最终只会制造更多问题”：一项探索帕金森病患者及其照护者家庭口腔护理经验的定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 13 名帕金森病患者及 7 名照护者的定性研究发现，运动和非运动障碍，包括精细动作减少、疲劳和冷漠，给家庭口腔护理活动带来了挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study highlights the challenges faced by Parkinson's patients and their caregivers in mouthcare, such as dexterity issues, fatigue, and apathy. This suggests that you should not overlook the details of Activities of Daily Living (ADLs) in rehabilitation plans and proactively assess and support patients and families regarding functional impairments in areas like oral hygiene.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量小（20 人），结果的普遍性有限，主要提供深入的经验理解而非量化数据。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative study with a small sample size (20 individuals), so the generalizability of its findings is limited; it primarily offers in-depth experiential understanding rather than quantitative data.

items.title: Pioneering programme launched to test breakthrough spinal treatment in UK rehab centres
items.summary: A pioneering program has launched in UK rehab centers to test the ARC-EX system, a breakthrough spinal cord injury treatment combining targeted electrical spinal cord stimulation with rehabilitation exercises, aimed at restoring strength and movement.
items.curatedReason: 英国启动了一项突破性的脊髓损伤治疗项目，在康复中心测试 ARC-EX 系统。如果英国监管通过并验证其临床疗效，这可能为你管理脊髓损伤患者带来全新的康复技术选项。
items.titleZh: 英国康复中心启动开创性项目，测试突破性脊髓治疗方案
items.summaryZh: 一项开创性项目已在英国康复中心启动，测试 ARC-EX 系统这一突破性脊髓损伤治疗方案。该系统结合了靶向电脊髓刺激和康复锻炼，旨在恢复力量和运动。
items.curatedReasonEn: A pioneering spinal cord injury treatment program has launched in UK rehab centers to test the ARC-EX system. If UK regulators approve and validate its clinical efficacy, this could offer a revolutionary new rehabilitation technology option for your spinal cord injury patients.
items.limitation: 这是一个早期项目启动的新闻，而非临床研究结果，实际疗效和广泛应用仍待验证。
items.limitationEn: This is news about an early project launch, not clinical research results; actual efficacy and widespread application still need to be verified.

items.title: The Impact of a Single Bout of Antagonist Stretching on Agonist Muscle Performance and Range of Motion: A Systematic review and Meta-analysis
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis investigated the impact of a single bout of antagonist stretching on agonist muscle performance and range of motion, noting conflicting findings in existing literature.
items.curatedReason: 单次拮抗肌牵伸对主动肌表现和运动范围的影响仍无定论。制定运动前牵伸方案时，不要一概而论，你需要更细致地考量牵伸类型、强度和目标肌群。
items.titleZh: 单次拮抗肌牵伸对主动肌表现和运动范围的影响：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析探讨了单次拮抗肌牵伸对主动肌表现和运动范围的影响，指出现有文献中的发现存在冲突。
items.curatedReasonEn: The impact of a single bout of antagonist stretching on agonist muscle performance and range of motion remains inconclusive. When designing pre-exercise stretching protocols, avoid generalizations; you need to consider stretching type, intensity, and target muscle groups more carefully.
items.limitation: 摘要中未明确提及纳入研究的异质性程度，可能影响结果的综合解释。
items.limitationEn: The degree of heterogeneity of included studies is not explicitly mentioned in the abstract, which may affect the overall interpretation of results.

items.title: Mattress impact on lifestyle and back pain: a 25-year orthopedic literature review guideline
items.summary: A 25-year literature review evaluated the impact of mattresses on lifestyle and back pain, suggesting that inadequate bedding support can contribute to low back pain, morning stiffness, and shoulder discomfort.
items.curatedReason: 这项对床垫影响腰背痛的 25 年文献回顾，再次强调了睡眠表面对脊柱健康的重要性。这提醒你在评估患者腰背痛时，别忘了把睡眠环境作为潜在可干预因素纳入考量。
items.titleZh: 床垫对生活方式和腰背痛的影响：25 年骨科文献综述指南
items.summaryZh: 一项长达 25 年的文献综述评估了床垫对生活方式和腰背痛的影响，提示不当的寝具支撑可能导致腰背痛、晨僵和肩部不适。
items.curatedReasonEn: This 25-year literature review on mattress impact on back pain re-emphasizes the importance of sleeping surfaces for spinal health. This reminds you to consider the sleeping environment as a potentially modifiable factor when evaluating patients with low back pain.
items.limitation: 这是一篇文献综述，而非系统综述或荟萃分析，可能存在选择偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This is a literature review, not a systematic review or meta-analysis, and may be subject to selection bias.

items.title: Efficacy and safety of immersive, sEMG-triggered virtual reality game training for post-stroke dysphagia: a randomized, single-blind, controlled trial
items.summary: A randomized, single-blind, controlled trial investigated the efficacy and safety of immersive, sEMG-triggered virtual reality game training for post-stroke dysphagia.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 显示，沉浸式 sEMG 触发虚拟现实游戏训练对卒中后吞咽困难安全有效。这为卒中神经康复提供了新的技术选择，你应该考虑将其作为传统吞咽治疗的补充，尤其是在需要提升患者依从性和趣味性的情况下。
items.titleZh: 沉浸式 sEMG 触发虚拟现实游戏训练对卒中后吞咽困难的疗效和安全性：一项随机单盲对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机、单盲、对照试验研究了沉浸式肌电（sEMG）触发虚拟现实游戏训练对卒中后吞咽困难的疗效和安全性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT shows that immersive sEMG-triggered virtual reality game training is safe and effective for post-stroke dysphagia. This offers a new technological option for stroke neurorehabilitation, and you should consider it as a supplement to traditional swallowing therapy, especially when patient adherence and engagement need to be enhanced.
items.limitation: 这是一项单盲试验，可能存在一定的偏倚风险，且未提及长期随访结果。
items.limitationEn: This is a single-blind trial, which may carry some risk of bias, and long-term follow-up results are not mentioned.

items.title: Integrating serum neurotrophin profiles and quantitative EEG for predicting motor outcomes in acute ischemic stroke
items.summary: This research investigated whether integrating serum neurotrophin profiles with quantitative electroencephalography (qEEG) parameters enhances predictive accuracy for 6-month motor outcomes beyond conventional methods in acute ischemic stroke.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明，整合血清神经营养因子谱和定量脑电图（qEEG）能更准确地预测急性缺血性卒中后的运动结局。这提醒你，未来在卒中预后评估中，除了常规临床指标，还可以考虑结合更复杂的生物标志物和神经生理学数据，以优化康复方案。
items.titleZh: 整合血清神经营养因子谱和定量脑电图以预测急性缺血性卒中运动结局
items.summaryZh: 这项研究探讨了整合血清神经营养因子谱和定量脑电图（qEEG）参数，是否能比传统方法更准确地预测急性缺血性卒中后 6 个月的运动结局。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study indicates that integrating serum neurotrophin profiles with quantitative EEG (qEEG) can more accurately predict motor outcomes after acute ischemic stroke. This suggests that in future stroke prognosis assessments, in addition to conventional clinical indicators, you might consider combining more complex biomarkers and neurophysiological data to optimize rehabilitation protocols.
items.limitation: 这是一项观察性研究，可能存在混杂因素，且其预测模型的普适性尚待大规模验证。
items.limitationEn: This is an observational study that may have confounding factors, and the generalizability of its predictive model requires large-scale validation.

items.title: Risk and protective factors for musculoskeletal injury in youth track and field: a methodological scoping review | BMC Sports Science, Medicine and Rehabilitation
items.summary: A methodological scoping review identified risk and protective factors for musculoskeletal injury in youth track and field, noting widespread injuries due to growth, maturation, and escalating training loads, and inconsistent definitions across studies.
items.curatedReason: 青少年田径运动员的肌肉骨骼损伤风险较高，与成长发育、成熟度以及训练负荷增加密切相关。作为康复师，你在设计损伤预防方案时，务必考虑这些个体差异，平衡训练强度与身体适应能力，同时要注意不同研究对损伤定义的差异。
items.titleZh: 青少年田径运动肌肉骨骼损伤的风险和保护因素：一项方法学范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项方法学范围综述识别了青少年田径运动员肌肉骨骼损伤的风险和保护因素，指出生长、发育和训练负荷增加导致损伤普遍存在，且研究定义不一致。
items.curatedReasonEn: Musculoskeletal injury risk is high in youth track and field athletes, strongly linked to growth, maturation, and escalating training loads. As a therapist, when designing injury prevention programs, you must account for these individual differences, balance training intensity with physical adaptability, and be aware of inconsistent injury definitions across studies.
items.limitation: 这是一项方法学范围综述，主要评估研究方法而非直接提供干预效果，结论可能受限于现有研究质量。
items.limitationEn: This is a methodological scoping review, primarily evaluating research methods rather than directly providing intervention effects, and conclusions may be limited by the quality of existing studies.

items.title: Surgical repair of radial meniscus tears yields favorable healing rates: a systematic review | Journal of Orthopaedic Surgery and Research
items.summary: A systematic review reported on current surgical techniques, patient-reported outcome measures (PROMs), and quantified healing rates following repair of radial meniscus tears, finding favorable healing rates.
items.curatedReason: 放射状半月板撕裂手术修复的愈合率良好。这支持你在与骨科医生协作时，可以对患者的术后康复结果抱有积极预期。
items.titleZh: 放射状半月板撕裂手术修复具有良好的愈合率：一项系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述报告了放射状半月板撕裂手术修复的当前手术技术、患者报告结局测量（PROMs）以及量化的愈合率，发现愈合率良好。
items.curatedReasonEn: Surgical repair of radial meniscus tears demonstrates favorable healing rates. This supports positive expectations for post-operative rehabilitation outcomes when collaborating with orthopedic surgeons.
items.limitation: 作为系统综述，其结论的强度取决于纳入研究的异质性和质量，摘要中未提供详细评估。
items.limitationEn: As a systematic review, the strength of its conclusions depends on the heterogeneity and quality of included studies, with no detailed assessment provided in the abstract.

items.title: Online versus offline Fugl-Meyer lower extremity training for physical therapy students: a randomized study
items.summary: This randomized study compared online versus offline education for improving the accuracy and reliability of the Fugl-Meyer Assessment of the lower extremities (FMA-LE) among physical therapy students.
items.curatedReason: 在线教学在提高 FMA-LE 评估的准确性和可靠性方面，与线下教学效果相当。教育者不必纠结于模式，应优先确保内容和练习质量；对学生而言，选择最适合自身学习习惯的模式即可。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗学生 Fugl-Meyer 下肢评定在线与线下培训的随机研究
items.summaryZh: 这项随机研究比较了在线和线下教育在提高物理治疗学生 Fugl-Meyer 下肢评定（FMA-LE）准确性和可靠性方面的效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: Online education is comparable to offline teaching in improving the accuracy and reliability of FMA-LE assessments. As an educator, prioritize content and practice quality over delivery mode. As a student, choose the mode that best suits your learning style.
items.limitation: 研究只比较了 FMA-LE 的培训效果，未涵盖其他评估工具或更广泛的临床技能。
items.limitationEn: The study only compared training effectiveness for FMA-LE, not other assessment tools or broader clinical skills.

items.title: Unicompartmental knee arthroplasty and total knee arthroplasty in patients with 15 or more degrees of varus deformity: age- and gender-matched comparative study of radiographic and clinical outcomes | Archives of Orthopaedic and Trauma Surgery
items.summary: An age- and gender-matched comparative study investigated radiographic and clinical outcomes of unicompartmental knee arthroplasty versus total knee arthroplasty in patients with 15 or more degrees of varus deformity.
items.curatedReason: 对于内翻畸形超过 15 度的患者，单髁置换术与全膝置换术在放射学和临床结果上可能存在差异。这项观察性研究提示，在解释重度内翻畸形患者的手术选择和预期结果时，应更审慎地权衡两种术式。
items.titleZh: 重度内翻畸形患者单髁与全膝关节置换术的影像学和临床结果比较研究
items.summaryZh: 一项年龄和性别匹配的比较研究，探讨了在内翻畸形超过 15 度的患者中，单髁膝关节置换术与全膝关节置换术在影像学和临床结果方面的差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: For patients with varus deformity greater than 15 degrees, unicompartmental versus total knee arthroplasty may yield different radiographic and clinical outcomes. This observational study suggests a more cautious approach when explaining surgical options and anticipated results for severe varus deformity, carefully weighing both procedures.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性病例对照研究，存在选择偏倚，且随访时间未在摘要中明确提及。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective case-control study with selection bias, and follow-up duration is not explicitly mentioned in the abstract.

items.title: Pelvic Floor Knowledge and Dysfunctions in Female Athletes: Impact of Demographics, Sport Profile, and Physical Activity - International Urogynecology Journal
items.summary: This study investigated pelvic floor knowledge and dysfunctions in female athletes, examining the impact of demographics, sport profile, and physical activity, noting that high-impact sports may exacerbate pelvic floor issues.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究揭示了女运动员盆底功能障碍的患病率及其与人口统计学、运动类型和体力活动的关系。这提醒你，在评估和管理女性运动员时，必须将盆底健康纳入考量，并根据运动特征调整预防和干预策略。
items.titleZh: 女运动员盆底知识和功能障碍：人口统计学、运动类型和体力活动的影响
items.summaryZh: 这项研究调查了女运动员的盆底知识和功能障碍，探讨了人口统计学、运动类型和体力活动对其影响，指出高冲击力运动可能加剧盆底问题。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study reveals the prevalence of pelvic floor dysfunctions in female athletes and its correlation with demographics, sport profile, and physical activity. This reminds you that when assessing and managing female athletes, you must consider pelvic floor health and adjust prevention and intervention strategies based on sport characteristics.
items.limitation: 这是一项横断面研究，无法确立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional study, which cannot establish causality.

items.title: Differences in Pelvic Floor Morphometry for Women with Persistent Pelvic Pain and Deep Infiltrating Endometriosis—A Cross-Sectional Study
items.summary: A cross-sectional study aimed to describe the morphometry of the pelvic floor in a large population of women with persistent pelvic pain (PPP) compared to those without pain, including those with deep infiltrating endometriosis.
items.curatedReason: 持续性盆腔疼痛（PPP）和深部浸润性子宫内膜异位症女性的盆底形态确实不同于无痛人群。这提示我们在评估这类患者时，应更深入地考虑盆底结构异常与疼痛之间的关联，但仅凭形态学差异尚不足以指导治疗。
items.titleZh: 持续性盆腔疼痛和深部浸润性子宫内膜异位症女性盆底形态的差异：一项横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面研究旨在描述持续性盆腔疼痛（PPP）女性与无疼痛女性（包括深部浸润性子宫内膜异位症患者）盆底形态的差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: Pelvic floor morphometry in women with persistent pelvic pain (PPP) and deep infiltrating endometriosis differs from pain-free individuals. This suggests a deeper consideration of the link between pelvic floor structural abnormalities and pain during assessment, though morphological differences alone are insufficient to guide treatment.
items.limitation: 这是一项横断面研究，不能确定盆底形态改变与疼痛或子宫内膜异位症之间的因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional study and cannot establish causality between pelvic floor morphometry changes and pain or endometriosis.

items.title: Long-Term Comparison of Patient-Reported Outcomes Following Six Surgical Procedures for Apical Suspension
items.summary: This study provides a long-term comparison of patient-reported outcomes following six different surgical procedures for apical suspension, which are used to treat pelvic organ prolapse.
items.curatedReason: 针对盆腔器官脱垂的六种顶端悬吊手术，患者报告的长期结局存在差异。在与患者共同决策手术方案时，应详细告知不同术式的长期有效性和潜在风险，并将其纳入术后康复计划的考量。
items.titleZh: 六种顶端悬吊手术患者报告结局的长期比较
items.summaryZh: 这项研究长期比较了六种不同顶端悬吊手术的患者报告结局，这些手术用于治疗盆腔器官脱垂。
items.curatedReasonEn: Long-term patient-reported outcomes vary across the six apical suspension procedures for pelvic organ prolapse. When making shared decisions with patients about surgical options, clearly communicate the long-term efficacy and potential risks of each technique, integrating this into post-operative rehabilitation planning.
items.limitation: 研究设计未在摘要中明确提及，无法评估证据等级。
items.limitationEn: The study design is not clearly mentioned in the abstract, preventing evaluation of the evidence level.

items.title: Clinical and functional outcomes of upper extremity 3D-printed immobilization devices compared to traditional methods: a systematic review with limited meta-analysis | Journal of Orthopaedic Surgery and Research
items.summary: A systematic review with limited meta-analysis compared the clinical and functional outcomes of upper extremity 3D-printed immobilization devices to traditional methods.
items.curatedReason: 上肢 3D 打印固定设备在临床和功能结果上，与传统方法相比可能具有优势。作为康复专业人士，你应该关注这项技术在改善患者舒适度、功能恢复等方面的潜力，并考虑其在临床实践中的应用可行性。
items.titleZh: 上肢 3D 打印固定设备与传统方法临床和功能结果的系统综述及有限荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和有限荟萃分析比较了上肢 3D 打印固定设备与传统方法的临床和功能结果。
items.curatedReasonEn: Upper extremity 3D-printed immobilization devices may offer advantages over traditional methods in clinical and functional outcomes. As a rehabilitation professional, you should explore the potential of this technology to improve patient comfort and functional recovery, and assess its feasibility for integration into clinical practice.
items.limitation: 研究仅限于有限的荟萃分析，可能因为纳入研究的异质性而未能进行更全面的定量分析。
items.limitationEn: The study was limited to a meta-analysis with limitations, possibly due to heterogeneity of included studies preventing more comprehensive quantitative analysis.

items.title: Online modulation of neural drive to lower motor neurons with high-definition transcranial alternating current stimulation (HD-tACS) | Journal of NeuroEngineering and Rehabilitation
items.summary: This research investigated the online modulation of neural drive to lower motor neurons using high-definition transcranial alternating current stimulation (HD-tACS), a form of non-invasive brain stimulation.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究探索了高精度经颅交流电刺激（HD-tACS）在线调节下运动神经元神经驱动的潜力。这是一个有前景的非侵入性脑刺激技术，未来可能用于改善神经肌肉功能，值得你持续关注。
items.titleZh: 高精度经颅交流电刺激（HD-tACS）在线调节下运动神经元神经驱动
items.summaryZh: 这项研究利用高精度经颅交流电刺激（HD-tACS）这种非侵入性脑刺激形式，探索了在线调节下运动神经元神经驱动的可能性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study explores the potential of high-definition transcranial alternating current stimulation (HD-tACS) for online modulation of neural drive to lower motor neurons. This is a promising non-invasive brain stimulation technology that may improve neuromuscular function in the future, and you should continue to monitor it.
items.limitation: 这项研究未提供临床结果或患者数据，仅关注神经生理学机制。
items.limitationEn: This study does not provide clinical outcomes or patient data, focusing solely on neurophysiological mechanisms.

items.title: MRI-based evidence of rectus capitis posterior minor hypertrophy and its correlation with disease duration in Parkinson’s disease
items.summary: An MRI-based study found evidence of rectus capitis posterior minor hypertrophy in Parkinson's disease patients and correlated it with disease duration.
items.curatedReason: 这项 MRI 研究显示，帕金森病患者小头后直肌肥大与病程相关。这可能为帕金森病的影像学生物标志物提供新线索，但对你目前临床实践的影响有限。
items.titleZh: 帕金森病中小头后直肌肥大的 MRI 证据及其与病程的相关性
items.summaryZh: 一项基于 MRI 的研究发现帕金森病患者存在小头后直肌肥大的证据，并发现其与病程相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: This MRI study shows that rectus capitis posterior minor hypertrophy is correlated with disease duration in Parkinson's disease. This may provide new clues for imaging biomarkers in Parkinson's disease, but its impact on your current clinical practice is limited.
items.limitation: 这是一项横断面研究，无法确立因果关系，且其临床意义尚待进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional study that cannot establish causality, and its clinical significance requires further validation.

items.title: Rehabilitation in patients with primary brain tumors: a scoping review of current guideline recommendations
items.summary: A scoping review summarized current guideline recommendations for rehabilitation in patients with primary brain tumors, aiming to provide an overview of existing evidence-based practices.
items.curatedReason: 现有指南对原发性脑肿瘤患者的康复给出了具体建议。你应该参考这些循证实践，作为制定和实施这类复杂患者康复方案的框架，以确保提供最佳的康复干预。
items.titleZh: 原发性脑肿瘤患者康复：当前指南建议的范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述总结了当前针对原发性脑肿瘤患者康复的指南建议，旨在提供现有循证实践的概览。
items.curatedReasonEn: Current guidelines offer specific recommendations for rehabilitation in patients with primary brain tumors. You should utilize these evidence-based practices as a framework for designing and implementing rehabilitation programs for these complex patients, ensuring optimal intervention.
items.limitation: 范围综述的性质决定了它总结的是现有指南，而非提供新的原始证据或进行严格的质量评估。
items.limitationEn: The nature of a scoping review means it summarizes existing guidelines rather than providing new original evidence or performing rigorous quality assessment.

items.title: Scapular dyskinesis with preserved structure and function in largely asymptomatic junior elite tennis players: a 2D video and multimodal cross-sectional study | BMC Sports Science, Medicine and Rehabilitation
items.summary: A 2D video and multimodal cross-sectional study investigated scapular dyskinesis in largely asymptomatic junior elite tennis players, finding dyskinesis often coexists with preserved structure and function.
items.curatedReason: 这项横断面研究发现，在大多数无症状的青少年精英网球运动员中存在肩胛骨运动障碍，但其结构和功能保持良好。这提醒你，单纯的运动障碍发现可能不足以诊断病理，需要结合功能评估和症状学进行综合判断。
items.titleZh: 青少年精英网球运动员肩胛骨运动障碍与结构功能保留的二维视频及多模态横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项二维视频和多模态横断面研究调查了大部分无症状的青少年精英网球运动员的肩胛骨运动障碍，发现运动障碍常与结构和功能的保留并存。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study found scapular dyskinesis with preserved structure and function in largely asymptomatic junior elite tennis players. This reminds you that the mere finding of dyskinesis may not be sufficient for pathological diagnosis, and a comprehensive judgment should be made in conjunction with functional assessment and symptomatology.
items.limitation: 这是一项横断面研究，不能确定肩胛骨运动障碍是否会发展为有症状的损伤，也无法推断其因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional study that cannot determine if scapular dyskinesis develops into symptomatic injury, nor can it infer causality.

items.title: Electromyography patterns during running in injured versus healthy runners: a systematic review
items.summary: A systematic review investigated electromyography patterns during running in injured versus healthy runners, focusing on the role of muscle coordination in running injuries, a less-explored area compared to kinematic factors.
items.curatedReason: 受伤与健康跑者跑步时的肌电图模式存在差异。这提示我们，除了运动学因素，肌肉协调问题也是跑步损伤的重要生物力学根源，评估跑者时应纳入此项考量。
items.titleZh: 受伤与健康跑者跑步时肌电图模式的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述调查了受伤与健康跑者在跑步时的肌电图模式，侧重于肌肉协调在跑步损伤中的作用，这是一个相比运动学因素而言较少探索的领域。
items.curatedReasonEn: Differences in electromyography patterns exist between injured and healthy runners. This suggests that, beyond kinematic factors, muscle coordination issues are a significant biomechanical root of running injuries, and should be included when assessing runners.
items.limitation: 系统综述的结论质量取决于纳入研究的质量和异质性，摘要中未提供具体细节。
items.limitationEn: The quality of conclusions from a systematic review depends on the quality and heterogeneity of included studies, with no specific details provided in the abstract.

items.title: Stepwise surgical management of spasticity and dystonia in severe pediatric cerebral palsy: a case report involving selective dorsal rhizotomy, intrathecal baclofen therapy, and deep brain stimulation
items.summary: A case report details the stepwise surgical management of spasticity and dystonia in severe pediatric cerebral palsy, involving selective dorsal rhizotomy, intrathecal baclofen therapy, and deep brain stimulation.
items.curatedReason: 这篇病例报告展示了针对严重儿童脑瘫中痉挛和肌张力障碍的逐步手术干预方法，包括选择性脊神经后根切断术、鞘内巴氯芬和DBS。但请记住，这仅是个案经验，无法推广至所有类似患者。
items.titleZh: 重度儿童脑瘫痉挛和肌张力障碍的逐步手术管理：选择性脊神经后根切断术、鞘内巴氯芬疗法和深部脑刺激的病例报告
items.summaryZh: 一篇病例报告详细介绍了重度儿童脑瘫痉挛和肌张力障碍的逐步手术管理，包括选择性脊神经后根切断术、鞘内巴氯芬疗法和深部脑刺激。
items.curatedReasonEn: This case report illustrates a stepwise surgical approach for spasticity and dystonia in severe pediatric cerebral palsy, involving selective dorsal rhizotomy, intrathecal baclofen, and DBS. However, remember this is only a single case experience and cannot be generalized to all similar patients.
items.limitation: 这是一篇病例报告，证据等级低，不能直接推广到其他患者群体。
items.limitationEn: This is a case report with a low level of evidence and cannot be directly generalized to other patient populations.

items.title: Melatonin promotes recovery from ischemic stroke by modulating microglia polarization and inhibiting oligodendrocyte pyroptosis via the RORα/AMPKα/STAT1 pathway
items.summary: This research investigates how melatonin promotes recovery from ischemic stroke by modulating microglia polarization and inhibiting oligodendrocyte pyroptosis via the RORα/AMPKα/STAT1 pathway.
items.curatedReason: 褪黑素可能通过 RORα/AMPKα/STAT1 通路调控小胶质细胞极化和抑制少突胶质细胞焦亡，从而促进缺血性卒中恢复。这虽然是基础研究，但为我们理解卒中后神经保护和修复提供了新的潜在靶点，未来可能转化为临床干预。
items.titleZh: 褪黑素通过 RORα/AMPKα/STAT1 通路调节小胶质细胞极化和抑制少突胶质细胞焦亡以促进缺血性卒中恢复
items.summaryZh: 这项研究探讨了褪黑素如何通过调节小胶质细胞极化和抑制少突胶质细胞焦亡，经由 RORα/AMPKα/STAT1 通路，促进缺血性卒中后的恢复。
items.curatedReasonEn: Melatonin may promote recovery from ischemic stroke by modulating microglia polarization and inhibiting oligodendrocyte pyroptosis via the RORα/AMPKα/STAT1 pathway. While fundamental research, this offers new potential targets for understanding post-stroke neuroprotection and repair, potentially translating into clinical interventions.
items.limitation: 这是一项基础研究，结果来自细胞和动物模型，临床转化仍需大量工作。
items.limitationEn: This is a basic research study, with results from cell and animal models, requiring substantial work for clinical translation.

items.title: Mechanisms of Idiopathic Neurodegeneration in Substantia Nigra Neurons: Biochemical, Physiological, and Immuno-Humoral Perspectives
items.summary: This review critically synthesizes proposed mechanisms underlying idiopathic neurodegeneration of substantia nigra neurons, emphasizing age-related vulnerability and neuron-specific factors.
items.curatedReason: 黑质神经元特发性神经退行性变的机制复杂，与年龄相关脆弱性和神经元特异性因素有关。这篇综述深化了我们对帕金森病等神经退行性疾病病理生理学的理解，但目前仍停留在理论层面，对你直接的临床实践指导有限。
items.titleZh: 黑质神经元特发性神经退行性变的机制：生化、生理和免疫体液视角
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述批判性地综合了黑质神经元特发性神经退行性变的机制，强调了年龄相关脆弱性和神经元特异性因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: Idiopathic neurodegeneration of substantia nigra neurons is complex, linked to age-related vulnerability and neuron-specific factors. This review deepens our understanding of the pathophysiology of neurodegenerative diseases like Parkinson's, but remains theoretical with limited direct guidance for your clinical practice.
items.limitation: 这是一篇综述，主要关注理论机制，而非临床干预或患者结局。
items.limitationEn: This is a review, primarily focusing on theoretical mechanisms rather than clinical interventions or patient outcomes.

items.title: Exploration of Exercise-Induced Gastrointestinal Syndrome in Endurance-Trained Adolescents: Is There Cause for Concern in Regard to Ultra-endurance Event Participation
items.summary: An original research article explored exercise-induced gastrointestinal syndrome (EIGS) in endurance-trained adolescents, questioning the cause for concern regarding ultra-endurance event participation.
items.curatedReason: 耐力训练青少年可能存在运动性胃肠道综合征（EIGS）的风险，但这篇观察性研究对超耐力项目的参与是否应引起担忧提出了疑问。仍需更多证据来明确EIGS在青少年超耐力运动员中的实际风险。
items.titleZh: 耐力训练青少年运动性胃肠道综合征的探索：超耐力赛事参与是否引起关注？
items.summaryZh: 一篇原创研究文章探讨了耐力训练青少年中运动性胃肠道综合征（EIGS）的现象，并质疑其在超耐力赛事参与方面是否应引起关注。
items.curatedReasonEn: Endurance-trained adolescents may be at risk for exercise-induced gastrointestinal syndrome (EIGS), but this observational study questions whether ultra-endurance event participation should be a cause for concern. More evidence is needed to clarify the actual risk of EIGS in adolescent ultra-endurance athletes.
items.limitation: 这是一项原始研究文章，不是系统综述，其结论可能需要更多研究验证。
items.limitationEn: This is an original research article, not a systematic review, and its conclusions may require further verification through more studies.

items.title: Applications of ICF-Based Assessments and Interventions in Post-Stroke Rehabilitation: A Narrative Review.
items.summary: A narrative review synthesized 166 studies on ICF-based assessments and interventions in post-stroke rehabilitation, mapping 546 assessments to the ICF framework, with over 80% overlap with UK Stroke Guideline topics.
items.curatedReason: ICF 框架下的评估和干预在卒中康复中得到广泛应用，本综述帮你快速了解现有研究主要集中在哪些方面、与 UK 指南的契合度。但具体应用策略还得看未来更高级别的证据。
items.titleZh: 基于 ICF 评估和干预在卒中康复中的应用：一项叙述性综述
items.summaryZh: 一项叙述性综述综合了 166 项关于卒中后康复中基于 ICF 评估和干预的研究，将 546 项评估映射到 ICF 框架，与英国卒中指南主题重叠超过 80%。
items.curatedReasonEn: ICF-based assessments and interventions are widely used in stroke rehabilitation. This review helps you quickly understand current research focus areas and alignment with UK guidelines. However, specific application strategies still require higher-level evidence.
items.limitation: 本综述属于叙述性综述，可能存在选择偏倚，且未提供具体干预措施的疗效数据。
items.limitationEn: This is a narrative review, which may be subject to selection bias and does not provide efficacy data for specific interventions.

items.title: Comparative efficacy of different joint mobilization techniques in shoulder adhesive capsulitis: a systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials found no significant differences in the clinical effects of various non-thrust joint mobilization techniques on objective and subjective outcomes for individuals with shoulder adhesive capsulitis.
items.curatedReason: 肩周炎的非推力关节松动技术很多，但这项系统综述指出它们在改善疼痛和功能方面没有显著差异。选择技术时无需执着于特定手法，哪种能有效激活患者、易于实施就用哪种。
items.titleZh: 不同关节松动技术治疗肩周炎的疗效比较：一项随机对照试验的系统综述与 Meta 分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和 Meta 分析发现，对于肩周炎患者，不同的非推力关节松动技术在改善客观和主观结果方面没有显著差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: While various non-thrust joint mobilization techniques exist for shoulder adhesive capsulitis, this systematic review found no significant differences in their efficacy for improving pain and function. Don't overthink specific techniques; choose what is practical and effectively engages the patient.
items.limitation: 本系统综述虽纳入 RCT，但未报告具体效应量或异质性，限制了临床决策的精细度。
items.limitationEn: Although this systematic review included RCTs, it did not report specific effect sizes or heterogeneity, limiting the precision of clinical decision-making.
items.journal: The Journal of manual & manipulative therapy

items.title: Real-World Outcomes of a Telephone-Based Virtual Cognitive Rehabilitation Therapy Program: A Retrospective Cohort Analysis
items.summary: A retrospective cohort analysis of 141 older adults with MCI/early dementia found a telephone-based virtual cognitive rehabilitation therapy program, combining SLP-led sessions with automated exercises, was effective in improving daily functioning, with a mean age of 71.2 years.
items.curatedReason: 电话虚拟认知康复项目在真实世界中对轻度认知障碍和早期痴呆患者显示出有效性。考虑将远程医疗模式纳入你的认知康复服务，特别是在服务可及性受限的地区。
items.titleZh: 电话虚拟认知康复治疗项目的真实世界结果：一项回顾性队列分析
items.summaryZh: 一项对 141 名轻度认知障碍/早期痴呆老年人的回顾性队列分析发现，结合言语治疗师主导会话和自动化运动的电话虚拟认知康复治疗项目，在改善日常功能方面有效，患者平均年龄为 71.2 岁。
items.curatedReasonEn: A telephone-based virtual cognitive rehabilitation program showed effectiveness in real-world settings for individuals with mild cognitive impairment and early-stage dementia. Consider integrating telehealth models into your cognitive rehabilitation services, especially in areas with limited access.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性观察分析，存在选择偏倚和混杂因素的风险。
items.limitationEn: This retrospective observational analysis carries risks of selection bias and confounding factors.

items.title: Development and Preliminary Clinical Feasibility of a Wearable Nanovibration Delivery Device for Localised Bone Stimulation in Individuals with Spinal Cord Injury
items.summary: A wearable nanovibration delivery device, designed to provide localized bone stimulation at 1 kHz for individuals with spinal cord injury to address rapid bone loss in paralyzed lower limbs, demonstrated preliminary clinical feasibility.
items.curatedReason: 这款可穿戴纳米振动设备为脊髓损伤患者的局部骨骼刺激提供了初步可行性。关注这种非侵入性技术未来在预防骨质流失方面的潜力，但目前仍在早期开发阶段。
items.titleZh: 用于脊髓损伤患者局部骨骼刺激的可穿戴纳米振动传输设备的开发和初步临床可行性
items.summaryZh: 一款用于脊髓损伤患者局部骨骼刺激的可穿戴纳米振动传输设备，旨在解决瘫痪下肢快速骨质流失问题，已开发成功并显示出初步临床可行性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This wearable nanovibration device shows preliminary clinical feasibility for localized bone stimulation in individuals with spinal cord injury. Monitor the potential of this non-invasive technology for preventing bone loss, but note it is still in early development.
items.limitation: 本研究仅为设备开发和初步可行性评估，未报告临床疗效数据。
items.limitationEn: This study focuses on device development and preliminary feasibility, with no clinical efficacy data reported.

items.title: Examination and treatment of the spine for upper extremity pain: a case series.
items.summary: A case series describes three patients with upper extremity pain who achieved clinically significant improvements in self-reported disability after receiving spine mobilization or manipulation techniques, even when their symptoms did not correspond with typical pain referral patterns.
items.curatedReason: 这个病例系列提示，当上肢疼痛患者的症状与典型放射模式不符时，应考虑脊柱功能障碍可能。将脊柱评估和治疗纳入鉴别诊断流程。
items.titleZh: 上肢疼痛的脊柱检查与治疗：病例系列报告
items.summaryZh: 一个病例系列报告了三名上肢疼痛患者，他们在接受脊柱松动或手法治疗后，自我报告的残疾程度获得了临床显著改善，即使症状不符合典型疼痛放射模式。
items.curatedReasonEn: This case series suggests considering spinal dysfunction when upper extremity pain patterns don't align with typical referral patterns. Integrate spinal assessment and treatment into your differential diagnosis process.
items.limitation: 本研究为病例系列，证据等级低，结果外推性受限。
items.limitationEn: This study is a case series, offering low-level evidence with limited generalizability.
items.journal: The Journal of manual & manipulative therapy

items.title: Figure-of-Eight Taping Combined with Rehabilitation for Multidirectional Shoulder Instability in a School-Age Female Karate Athlete: A Case Report.
items.summary: A case report describes a 12-year-old female karate athlete with multidirectional shoulder instability (MDI) whose exercise therapy was effectively facilitated by figure-of-eight taping, leading to symptom improvement.
items.curatedReason: 对于多方向肩关节不稳（MDI）患者，尤其是在进行强化训练困难时，八字贴扎可能是一个有用的辅助手段。将这种贴扎技术视为运动疗法协同工具。
items.titleZh: 八字贴扎结合康复训练治疗学龄空手道女运动员多方向肩关节不稳：病例报告
items.summaryZh: 一份病例报告描述了一名 12 岁空手道女运动员的多方向肩关节不稳（MDI）病例，其运动疗法通过八字贴扎得到有效促进，症状获得改善。
items.curatedReasonEn: For patients with multidirectional shoulder instability (MDI), especially when strengthening exercises are challenging, figure-of-eight taping may be a useful adjunct. Consider this taping technique as a synergistic tool for exercise therapy.
items.limitation: 本研究为单例报告，证据强度弱，结论无法普遍推广。
items.limitationEn: This is a single case report, offering weak evidence with limited generalizability.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Physiotherapists' knowledge, attitude and practice of motor learning in stroke rehabilitation.
items.summary: A survey of 40 South African physiotherapists revealed a wide spread in their knowledge, attitudes, and practices regarding motor learning in stroke rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 南非理疗师在卒中康复中对运动学习的知识、态度和实践存在差异。这提示你需要定期审视自己的运动学习理论知识和实践，确保其与最新证据保持一致。
items.titleZh: 南非物理治疗师在卒中康复中运动学习的知识、态度和实践
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 40 名南非物理治疗师的调查显示，他们在卒中康复中对运动学习的知识、态度和实践存在广泛差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: Physiotherapists in South Africa show varied knowledge, attitudes, and practices regarding motor learning in stroke rehabilitation. This highlights the need to regularly review your own motor learning theory and practice to ensure alignment with current evidence.
items.limitation: 本研究为小样本横断面调查，仅限于南非理疗师，结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This small-sample cross-sectional survey is limited to South African physiotherapists, thus generalizability is restricted.
items.journal: The South African journal of physiotherapy

items.title: Distinct Patterns of Mobility Recovery After Stroke Using Routine Clinical Data
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study of 700 stroke adults identified distinct mobility recovery trajectories during the first 180 days post-stroke using Activity Measure for Post-Acute Care (AM-PAC) Basic Mobility scores, highlighting variability beyond average patterns.
items.curatedReason: 这项对700名卒中患者的观察研究提示，卒中后活动能力恢复并非千篇一律。你在制定康复计划时，应意识到患者可能会有非常不同的恢复轨迹，因此需要更个性化的评估和干预，而不是仅依赖平均恢复模式。
items.titleZh: 使用常规临床数据识别卒中后活动能力恢复的不同模式。
items.summaryZh: 一项对 700 名卒中成年人的回顾性队列研究，利用急性后期护理活动测量（AM-PAC）基本活动能力评分，识别出卒中后 180 天内活动能力恢复的不同轨迹，强调了超越平均模式的个体变异性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study of 700 stroke patients suggests that post-stroke mobility recovery is not uniform. When developing rehabilitation plans, you should recognize that patients may follow very different recovery trajectories, necessitating more personalized assessment and intervention rather than relying solely on average recovery patterns.
items.limitation: 该研究为预印本，尚未经过同行评审，结论的可靠性有待确认。
items.limitationEn: This study is a preprint and has not yet undergone peer review, so the reliability of its conclusions is pending confirmation.

items.title: Do blood flow restriction exercises offer additional benefits when compared to conventional exercises in musculoskeletal rehabilitation? A systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis found that low-load exercise with blood flow restriction (LLE-BFR) offers additional benefits over low-load exercise (LLE) and similar effects to high-load exercise (HLE) in improving muscle strength, disability, and pain for musculoskeletal conditions.
items.curatedReason: 运动伴血流限制（LLE-BFR）的综述和荟萃分析证实其在肌肉骨骼康复中，对于力量、残疾和疼痛强度，与传统低负荷运动（LLE）相比有额外益处，且与高负荷运动（HLE）效果相似。这意味着你可以考虑在不适合高负荷训练的患者中，优先采用 LLE-BFR。
items.titleZh: 血流限制运动在肌肉骨骼康复中是否比传统运动有额外益处？一项系统综述和荟萃分析。
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析发现，在肌肉骨骼疾病患者中，伴血流限制的低负荷运动（LLE-BFR）在改善肌肉力量、残疾和疼痛强度方面，比单纯低负荷运动（LLE）有额外益处，且与高负荷运动（HLE）效果相似。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis confirms that low-load exercise with blood flow restriction (LLE-BFR) offers additional benefits over conventional low-load exercise (LLE) in musculoskeletal rehabilitation for muscle strength, disability, and pain intensity, while being comparable to high-load exercise (HLE). This suggests you can prioritize LLE-BFR for patients unsuitable for high-load training.
items.limitation: 研究未明确指出具体的效应量数据，且未报告各项结局的异质性程度，可能影响临床决策的精确性。
items.limitationEn: The study does not explicitly state specific effect sizes or heterogeneity across outcomes, which might impact the precision of clinical decisions.

items.title: Frontline agreement in diagnosis and treatment for musculoskeletal dysfunctions. A prospective, randomized, controlled study.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial found high agreement in diagnosis, treatment, and discharge decisions for musculoskeletal dysfunctions between physiotherapists, resident physicians, and senior physicians in an emergency department setting.
items.curatedReason: 在急诊科的非紧急肌肉骨骼疾病患者管理中，高级物理治疗师与住院医师在诊断、治疗和出院决策方面与资深医师的一致性良好。这有力支持了在高级实践物理治疗师短缺的地区或紧急护理环境中，PT 可以作为一线诊断和管理提供者，从而缓解医疗系统压力。
items.titleZh: 肌肉骨骼功能障碍诊断和治疗的一线协议：一项前瞻性、随机对照研究。
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照研究显示，在急诊科处理非紧急肌肉骨骼疾病时，物理治疗师与住院医师在诊断、治疗和出院决策方面，与资深医师作为参考标准的一致性良好。
items.curatedReasonEn: In the management of non-urgent musculoskeletal conditions in the emergency department, advanced physiotherapists showed good agreement with resident and senior physicians on diagnosis, treatment, and discharge decisions. This strongly supports the role of PTs as frontline diagnostic and management providers in areas with advanced practice PT shortages or in urgent care settings, thereby alleviating healthcare system pressures.
items.limitation: 研究为单中心试验，外推性到其他医疗系统或文化背景可能受限。
items.limitationEn: The study is a single-center trial, and its generalizability to other healthcare systems or cultural contexts might be limited.

items.title: Effects of physical exercise on spasticity in people with multiple sclerosis: A systematic review.
items.summary: A systematic review of randomized controlled trials found that the effectiveness of different physical exercise interventions on spasticity in people with multiple sclerosis (MS) remains unclear, due to a narrative synthesis without pooled effects.
items.curatedReason: 该系统综述揭示了不同体育锻炼干预对多发性硬化症（MS）患者痉挛的影响尚不明确。在你为 MS 患者管理痉挛时，虽然运动作为非药物干预有潜力，但目前尚缺乏明确的证据支持特定运动方案的优越性，因此需持续关注新证据。
items.titleZh: 体育锻炼对多发性硬化症患者痉挛影响的系统综述。
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述旨在分析不同体育锻炼干预对多发性硬化症（MS）患者痉挛的影响，但研究结果尚未明确表明特定干预的显著优势，仅通过叙述性方式综合了现有证据。
items.limitation: 该综述未进行荟萃分析，仅为叙述性综合，可能限制了结论的强度和具体性。
items.limitationEn: The review did not conduct a meta-analysis, offering only a narrative synthesis, which may limit the strength and specificity of its conclusions.

items.title: Quantifying Physical Activity Through Step Count Estimation Across Multiple Wearable Sensor Configurations: A Validation Study in Post-Stroke and Healthy Adults.
items.summary: A validation study found that ActiGraph accelerometers, when placed on wrists, hips, and ankles, provide accurate stride counts compared to an instrumented treadmill in both post-stroke and healthy adults, across multiple walking speeds.
