items.curatedReason: 本研究验证了不同可穿戴传感器配置在卒中后患者和健康成人中步数估计的准确性，发现 ActiGraph 加速度计在手腕、臀部和脚踝放置均能提供可靠数据。这意味着你可以在临床实践中，根据患者的具体情况和舒适度，灵活选择传感器佩戴位置来量化身体活动，而无需担心准确性显著下降。
items.titleZh: 通过多重可穿戴传感器配置量化身体活动步数估计：一项卒中后和健康成年人的验证研究。
items.summaryZh: 一项验证研究表明，在卒中后患者和健康成年人中，ActiGraph 加速度计（佩戴于手腕、臀部、脚踝）能准确估计步数，与金标准器械跑台在多种步行速度下高度一致。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study validated the accuracy of step count estimation across various wearable sensor configurations in post-stroke and healthy adults, finding that ActiGraph accelerometers placed on wrists, hips, and ankles provide reliable data. This means you can flexibly choose sensor placement in clinical practice, based on patient comfort and specific needs, without significantly compromising accuracy when quantifying physical activity.
items.limitation: 研究未明确报告不同传感器位置和算法在不同步行速度下的精确度差异细节。
items.limitationEn: The study did not explicitly report detailed accuracy differences across various sensor placements and algorithms at different walking speeds.

items.title: Development of a Core Patient-Reported Outcome (Measures) Set for Pediatric Physical Therapy.
items.summary: A core set of nine patient-reported outcomes (PROs) and corresponding measures (PROMs) for pediatric physical therapy was developed, categorized into functioning, pain, and quality of life, suitable for daily practice, research, and quality assessment.
items.curatedReason: 你可以把这套 9 项核心 PROs/PROMs 直接植入儿科物理治疗的门诊、研究与质控流程——它把评估锚定在功能、疼痛和生活质量三个维度。别因为它新就观望，日常评估中缺少这三个领域的量化反馈本身就是短板。
items.titleZh: 儿科物理治疗核心患者报告结局（测量）集的开发。
items.summaryZh: 一项研究开发了一套儿科物理治疗的核心患者报告结局（PROs）和相应测量工具（PROMs），共九项 PROs，分为功能、疼痛和生活质量三个领域，适用于日常实践、研究和质量评估。
items.curatedReasonEn: You can integrate this core set of 9 PROs/PROMs directly into pediatric PT clinic workflows, research, and quality audits—it anchors assessment in functioning, pain, and quality of life. Don’t hold back just because it’s new; lacking quantitative feedback on these three domains is a gap in daily practice.
items.limitation: 该核心结局集仅基于美国的焦点小组、访谈和调查，其跨文化适用性可能受限。
items.limitationEn: This core outcome set was developed based on focus groups, interviews, and surveys primarily in the US, and its cross-cultural applicability may be limited.
items.journal: Pediatric physical therapy : the official publication of the Section on Pediatrics of the American Physical Therapy Association

items.title: The Impact of Mandatory Bundled Payment on Prehabilitation Delivery for Lower Extremity Joint Replacement.
items.summary: A difference-in-differences analysis found that the implementation of the Comprehensive Care for Joint Replacement (CJR) mandatory bundled payment model led to a significant 18.5 percentage point reduction in prehabilitation delivery for lower extremity joint replacement in CJR treatment areas compared to control areas.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究发现，美国强制性捆绑支付模式（CJR）导致了下肢关节置换术前康复（prehabilitation）服务提供比例的显著下降。这意味着在类似的捆绑支付或按绩效付费的医保模式下，你可能会面临转诊量减少或需要调整服务模式以适应新的报销环境，务必密切关注你所在地区的政策动态。
items.titleZh: 强制性捆绑支付对下肢关节置换术前康复服务提供的影响。
items.summaryZh: 一项双重差分分析显示，美国强制性捆绑支付模式（CJR）实施后，下肢关节置换术前康复服务的提供比例在 CJR 治疗区较对照区显著下降了 18.5 个百分点。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study found that the mandatory bundled payment model (CJR) in the US led to a significant decrease in the provision of prehabilitation services for lower extremity joint replacement. This means that under similar bundled payment or pay-for-performance healthcare models, you may experience reduced referrals or need to adjust your service model to adapt to new reimbursement environments. Close attention to policy changes in your region is crucial.
items.limitation: 研究数据来自 Medicare 受益人，其结论可能无法完全推广到其他商业保险或自费患者群体。
items.limitationEn: The study data is from Medicare beneficiaries, so its conclusions may not be fully generalizable to other commercial insurance or self-pay patient populations.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: The effectiveness of cardiovascular rehabilitation for transient ischaemic attack and mild stroke: A randomised controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial of 140 TIA/mild stroke participants found that a 6-week integrated cardiovascular rehabilitation program did not significantly improve 6-minute walk test distance or moderate-to-vigorous physical activity over 6 months compared to usual care.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验显示，针对短暂性脑缺血发作（TIA）或轻度卒中患者的整合性心血管康复项目，在 6 个月内未能显著改善功能性运动能力和身体活动水平。这意味着你可能需要重新审视或调整这类患者的康复目标和干预策略，尤其是在强调传统心血管康复模式时。
items.titleZh: 心血管康复对短暂性脑缺血发作和轻度卒中患者的有效性：一项随机对照试验。
items.summaryZh: 一项纳入 140 名短暂性脑缺血发作（TIA）或轻度卒中患者的随机对照试验显示，为期 6 周的整合性心血管康复项目在 6 个月内，未能显著改善患者的 6 分钟步行距离或中高强度身体活动水平，与常规护理相比无明显优势。
items.curatedReasonEn: This randomized controlled trial shows that an integrated cardiovascular rehabilitation program for transient ischemic attack (TIA) or mild stroke patients did not significantly improve functional exercise capacity and physical activity levels over 6 months. This suggests you may need to re-evaluate or adjust rehabilitation goals and intervention strategies for these patients, especially when emphasizing traditional cardiovascular rehabilitation models.
items.limitation: 研究未详细报告干预组和对照组在基线时的具体差异，可能影响结果解释。
items.limitationEn: The study did not report detailed baseline differences between intervention and control groups, which might affect result interpretation.

items.title: Follow up to the 2018 IOC consensus statement on paediatric ACL injuries: towards a broader vision of care
items.summary: An editorial updates the 2018 IOC consensus statement on pediatric ACL injuries, emphasizing a broader vision of care encompassing prevention, individualized management, evolving surgical strategies, and long-term holistic care.
items.curatedReason: 国际奥委会（IOC）2018 年儿童前交叉韧带（ACL）损伤共识声明的后续进展，强调了对该损伤的更广泛关注，包括预防、个体化管理、手术策略和长期全方位护理。这提示你，在处理儿童 ACL 损伤时，应采纳多维度、全周期的干预方法，而非仅仅关注急性期的治疗。
items.titleZh: 2018 年国际奥委会儿童前交叉韧带损伤共识声明的后续进展：迈向更广阔的护理愿景。
items.summaryZh: 一篇社论更新了 2018 年国际奥委会（IOC）关于儿童前交叉韧带（ACL）损伤的共识声明，强调了在预防、个体化管理、手术策略演变和长期全方位护理方面，需要更广阔的护理愿景。
items.curatedReasonEn: The follow-up to the 2018 International Olympic Committee (IOC) consensus statement on pediatric anterior cruciate ligament (ACL) injuries emphasizes a broader vision of care, including prevention, individualized management, surgical strategies, and long-term holistic care. This suggests that when dealing with pediatric ACL injuries, you should adopt a multi-dimensional, full-cycle intervention approach rather than focusing solely on acute treatment.

items.title: Prevalence of eating disorders and disordered eating in athletes: a systematic review and meta-analysis
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis estimated the prevalence of eating disorders (EDs) and disordered eating (DE) among athletes across training levels and assessment methods, identifying moderators associated with prevalence estimates.
items.curatedReason: 你在评估运动员时，必须高度警惕进食障碍（EDs）和紊乱性进食（DE）的普遍风险。鉴于本系统综述和荟萃分析的高证据等级，你应该根据训练水平、性别和运动类型等因素，更有针对性地筛查高危运动员，因为特定人群的患病率差异显著。
items.titleZh: 运动员中进食障碍和紊乱性进食的患病率：一项系统综述和荟萃分析。
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析旨在估算不同训练水平和评估方法下运动员中进食障碍（EDs）和紊乱性进食（DE）的患病率，并识别与患病率估计相关的调节因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: You must be highly vigilant about the pervasive risk of eating disorders (EDs) and disordered eating (DE) when assessing athletes. Given the high evidence level of this systematic review and meta-analysis, you should more specifically screen high-risk athletes based on factors like training level, sex, and sport type, as prevalence varies significantly across different populations.
items.limitation: 原始文献中未能提供该综述具体的患病率数字和效应量。
items.limitationEn: The original text did not provide specific prevalence figures or effect sizes from the review.

items.title: Multimodal Integration of Gait, Balance, and Infrared Thermography Enhances Machine-Learning Classification of Knee Osteoarthritis: A Cross-Sectional Study
items.summary: A cross-sectional study found that multimodal integration of gait, balance, and infrared thermography data significantly enhances machine-learning classification accuracy between individuals with knee osteoarthritis (KOA) and healthy controls compared to single-domain models.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明，结合步态、平衡和红外热成像的多模态数据能显著提高机器学习模型在鉴别膝骨关节炎（KOA）患者和健康对照中的分类准确性。这意味着你在临床评估 KOA 时，可以考虑集成多种客观指标，利用更全面的数据来辅助诊断和风险分层，但机器学习模型在临床实践中的转化仍需进一步验证。
items.titleZh: 步态、平衡和红外热成像的多模态整合增强膝骨关节炎的机器学习分类：一项横断面研究。
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面研究发现，与单一领域模型相比，步态、平衡和红外热成像的多模态整合显著提升了机器学习模型在鉴别膝骨关节炎（KOA）患者和健康对照中的分类准确性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study suggests that multimodal integration of gait, balance, and infrared thermography data significantly enhances machine-learning classification accuracy between knee osteoarthritis (KOA) patients and healthy controls. This means you can consider integrating multiple objective metrics in clinical KOA assessments, utilizing more comprehensive data for diagnosis and risk stratification, although the translation of machine learning models into clinical practice still requires further validation.
items.limitation: 研究为横断面设计，无法揭示这些指标随时间变化的动态信息或预测疾病进展。
items.limitationEn: The study is a cross-sectional design, which cannot reveal dynamic information of these indicators over time or predict disease progression.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Identifying Gaps in Rehabilitation Strategies for Chronic Stroke: A Systematic Review of Evidence in Patients With and Without Nerve Transfer.
items.summary: A systematic review identified gaps in rehabilitation strategies for chronic stroke, noting a lack of direct comparisons and detailed protocols between contralateral C7 nerve transfer and technology-assisted/high-dose rehabilitation for upper limb impairment.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述强调了慢性卒中上肢康复策略中的证据空白，特别是对侧 C7 神经移植与技术辅助/大剂量康复之间的直接比较不足。在你为慢性卒中患者制定康复计划时，要意识到目前仍缺乏针对这些先进干预方案剂量、内容和交付模式的明确指导。
items.titleZh: 识别慢性卒中康复策略的空白：有无神经移植患者证据的系统综述。
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述发现，慢性卒中上肢康复中存在证据空白，特别是在对侧 C7 神经移植与技术辅助/大剂量康复之间，缺乏直接比较和详细的康复方案描述。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review highlights evidence gaps in upper limb rehabilitation strategies for chronic stroke, particularly the lack of direct comparisons between contralateral C7 nerve transfer and technology-assisted/high-dose rehabilitation. When planning rehabilitation for chronic stroke patients, be aware that clear guidance on the dosage, content, and delivery models of these advanced interventions is still missing.
items.limitation: 研究排除了非英文文献，可能存在发表偏倚。
items.limitationEn: The study excluded non-English literature, which may introduce publication bias.

items.title: Sarcopenia Increases Adjacent Segment Degeneration Risk within 3 Years of Anterior Cervical Discectomy and Fusion.
items.summary: An exploratory retrospective cohort study found that sarcopenia independently increases the risk of adjacent segment degeneration (ASD) within 3 years following anterior cervical discectomy and fusion (ACDF) (HR 2.22; 95% CI, 1.34-3.67; P=0.002).
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性队列研究表明，肌肉减少症会增加颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术（ACDF）后 3 年内发生邻近节段退变的风险。在对 ACDF 术后患者进行评估时，你需要将肌肉减少症作为独立风险因素纳入考量，并建议高风险患者进行术前干预或更密切的术后随访。
items.titleZh: 肌肉减少症增加颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术后 3 年内邻近节段退变的风险。
items.summaryZh: 一项探索性回顾性队列研究发现，肌肉减少症会独立增加颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术（ACDF）后 3 年内发生邻近节段退变（ASD）的风险（HR 2.22；95% CI，1.34-3.67；P=0.002）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective cohort study indicates that sarcopenia increases the risk of adjacent segment degeneration within 3 years following anterior cervical discectomy and fusion (ACDF). When evaluating post-ACDF patients, you should consider sarcopenia as an independent risk factor and recommend preoperative interventions or closer postoperative follow-up for high-risk patients.
items.limitation: 研究为回顾性队列设计，存在选择偏倚和混杂因素未完全控制的风险。
items.limitationEn: The study is a retrospective cohort design, carrying risks of selection bias and incompletely controlled confounding factors.

items.title: Task-Oriented training in a Patient with Triplegia: Post-Stroke Hemiparesis Complicating Pre-Existing Contralateral Upper Extremity Paralysis: A Case Report.
items.summary: A case report demonstrates that task-oriented training facilitated functional independence in a 75-year-old man with triplegia following stroke, showing significant improvements in Fugl-Meyer Assessment-UE scores (from 3 to 43) and Motor Activity Log.
items.curatedReason: 本病例报告展示了任务导向训练在卒中后三肢瘫患者中的潜在益处，尤其是在预先存在肢体瘫痪的情况下。这提示你，即使是复杂的神经损伤患者，强化任务导向训练也能带来功能改善，但毕竟只是个案。
items.titleZh: 三肢瘫患者的任务导向训练：一例卒中偏瘫合并对侧上肢既往瘫痪的病例报告。
items.summaryZh: 一项病例报告显示，在一名75岁、卒中后出现三肢瘫（右侧偏瘫合并左侧上肢既往瘫痪）的患者中，任务导向训练显著提高了其功能独立性，Fugl-Meyer 上肢评分为 3 分提升至 43 分，并在 1 年随访时维持在 41 分。
items.curatedReasonEn: This case report demonstrates the potential benefits of task-oriented training in a patient with post-stroke triplegia, especially with pre-existing limb paralysis. This suggests that even in patients with complex neurological injuries, intensive task-oriented training can lead to functional improvements, though it is only a case study.
items.limitation: 本研究为单例病例报告，结论的普适性极低。
items.limitationEn: This study is a single case report, and the generalizability of its conclusions is very low.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation
